calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee, For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee, And For An Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Settlement And Entry Of Orders Enforcing Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Advanced From Nov-28-22 To Oct-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement And Entry Of Orders Enforcing Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ron Peoples, via Zoom, for Erin McKeown, Petitioner.

The court notes that it left this matter scheduled for hearing to confirm whether there were going to be any objections to this matter. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. Mr. Peoples acknowledges the court's issue regarding proper service in this matter and reports of submitting a Notice Hearing on the mandatory Judicial Council form, DE-120. The court advises of its intent to approve the settlement agreement but is not inclined to order compliance regarding enforcement and that changes to the proposed order are likely to be made. Mr. Peoples advises that he is amenable to the court's tentative ruling.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order

EX PARTE PETITION TO ADVANCE HEARING DATE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Continued To Aug-31-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 202

Petition To Remove Trustee, For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee, And For An Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee, For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee, And For An Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jun-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee, For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee, And For An Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee, For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee, And For An Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Apr-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Ronald Peoples appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Peoples stated that opposing counsel will not be appearing today, that they have been moving towards settlement negotiations, that they kept going back and forth with negotiations, and that things fell down a little bit, but they are back on track. Mr. Peoples also stated that a mediation agreement is circulating between their offices which will allow for one additional mediation day, that they are looking at a date of March 21st, that they hope to go back to the same mediator and suggested a continuance date in April. In addition, Mr. Peoples stated that the examiner's notes are cleared, but they are finding addresses for the Italian contingent beneficiaries so that they can provide notice. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. is continued to April 18, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
